/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hermes_terminal.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libhermes_terminal.so -o libhermes_terminal.so CMakeFiles/hermes_terminal.dir/hermes_terminal_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hermes_terminal.dir/src/terminal_panel.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 -lqtermwidget6 -lQt6Widgets -lQt6Gui -lQt6Core /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
